author: Alex S
subject: v2.7.5
body: ## [2.7.5](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v2.7.4...v2.7.5) (2018-05-28) ### Bug Fixes * **clear-all:** apply excludeAttribute correctly with clearsQuery ([#2935](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/2935)) ([e782ab8](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/e782ab8)) * **connectInfiniteHits:** fix [#2928](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/2928) ([#2939](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/2939)) ([0293a31](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/0293a31))
